  • Hide All Code

Alports Merging and Filtering

Jonathan Nelson

15 April, 2025

1 Load Packages

if (!require("knitr")) {install.packages("knitr"); require("knitr")}
if (!requireNamespace('BiocManager', quietly = TRUE)) {install.packages('BiocManager'); require("BiocManager")}
if (!require("dplyr")) {install.packages("dplyr"); require("dplyr")}
if (!require("stringr")) {install.packages("stringr"); require("stringr")}
if (!require("Seurat")) {install.packages("Seurat"); require("Seurat")}
if (!require("sctransform")) {install.packages("sctransform"); require("sctransform")}
if (!require("glmGamPoi")) {BiocManager::install('glmGamPoi'); require("glmGamPoi")}
if (!require("patchwork")) {install.packages("patchwork"); require("patchwork")}
if (!require("ggplot2")) {install.packages("ggplot2"); require("ggplot2")}
if (!require("EnhancedVolcano")) {BiocManager::install('EnhancedVolcano'); require("EnhancedVolcano")}
if (!require("DESeq2")) {BiocManager::install('DESeq2'); require("DESeq2")}
if (!require("tidyverse")) {install.packages("tidyverse"); require("tidyverse")}
if (!require("RColorBrewer")) {install.packages("RColorBrewer"); require("RColorBrewer")}
if (!require("car")) {install.packages("car"); require("car")}
if (!require("openxlsx")) {install.packages("openxlsx"); require("openxlsx")}
if (!require("readxl")) {install.packages("readxl"); require("readxl")}
if (!require("ggrepel")) {install.packages("ggrepel"); require("ggrepel")}
if (!require("gghighlight")) {install.packages("gghighlight"); require("gghighlight")}
if (!require("ggpmisc")) {install.packages("ggpmisc"); require("ggpmisc")}
if (!require("data.table")) {install.packages("data.table"); require("data.table")}
if (!require("here")) {install.packages("here"); require("here")}

options(future.globals.maxSize = 74 * 1024^3) # 55 GB
getOption("future.globals.maxSize") #59055800320
## [1] 79456894976
here()
## [1] "D:/KRC Datasets/Sargis"

2 Loading Filtered Seurat Object

These files are post-DoubletFinder.

SO1 <- readRDS(here("outputs", "Alports_WT.rds"))
SO2 <- readRDS(here("outputs", "Alports_4M.rds"))
SO3 <- readRDS(here("outputs", "Alports_4M_EV.rds"))
SO4 <- readRDS(here("outputs", "Alports_4M_2EV.rds"))
SO5 <- readRDS(here("outputs", "Alports_6M.rds"))

3 Nuclei Entering the Analysis Pipeline

The following shows the number of nuclei post-QC and post-DoubletFinder. Numbers in # (10X Count) are the starting numbers for reference.
Values appear in the Environment when running the rmd.

SO1.nuc <- nrow(SO1@meta.data) 
SO1.nuc
## [1] 10202
SO2.nuc <- nrow(SO2@meta.data) 
SO2.nuc
## [1] 3485
SO3.nuc <- nrow(SO3@meta.data) 
SO3.nuc
## [1] 1441
SO4.nuc <- nrow(SO4@meta.data) 
SO4.nuc
## [1] 8211
SO5.nuc <- nrow(SO5@meta.data) 
SO5.nuc
## [1] 4455
head(SO1@meta.data)

4 Merging Replicates

SO <- merge(SO1, y = c(SO2, SO3, SO4, SO5), project = "Alports")

5 Add Metadata

meta <- read.xlsx(here("datasets", "metadata.xlsx"), sheet = 2)

meta2 <- meta  %>% select(c("Sample.Name", "batch", "group", "group_num", "alports", "ev")) 

df <- FetchData(SO, "sample") %>% rownames_to_column(var = "CellID")

df <- left_join(df, meta2, by = c("sample" = "Sample.Name")) %>% column_to_rownames(var = "CellID")

SO <- AddMetaData(SO, df)

head(SO@meta.data)
SO@meta.data$group <- factor(SO@meta.data$group, levels = c("WT", "4M_Alp", "4M_Alp_1EV", "4M_Alp_2EV", "6M_Alp"))

5.1 Nuclei Filtering and Batch Comparison

## An object of class Seurat 
## 33154 features across 27794 samples within 2 assays 
## Active assay: SCT (14847 features, 0 variable features)
##  3 layers present: counts, data, scale.data
##  1 other assay present: RNA

5.2 Chart of Nuclei Number

meta <- SO@meta.data

# Keep only categorical columns (character or factor)
meta_categorical <- meta %>%
  select(sample, group, where(~ is.character(.x) || is.factor(.x)))

# Pivot and count
summary_df <- meta_categorical %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(sample, group), names_to = "meta_col", values_to = "meta_value") %>%
  filter(meta_value == "Singlet") %>%
  group_by(sample, group) %>%
  summarise(n_cells = n(), .groups = "drop")

summary_df

summary_df$sample <- factor(summary_df$sample, 
                            levels = summary_df %>%
                              arrange(group, sample) %>%
                              pull(sample) %>%
                              unique())

ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = sample, y = n_cells, fill = group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(title = "Number of Cells per Sample",
       y = "Number of Cells",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Group") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

# Pivot and count
summary_df2 <- meta_categorical %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(group), names_to = "meta_col", values_to = "meta_value") %>%
  filter(meta_value == "Singlet") %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(n_cells = n(), .groups = "drop")

summary_df2

ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = group, y = n_cells, fill = group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(title = "Number of Cells per Group",
       y = "Number of Cells",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Group") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
  theme_classic()

5.3 Standard Seurat Pipeline

SO <- SCTransform(SO) %>%
    RunPCA() %>%
    FindNeighbors(dims = 1:30) %>%
    FindClusters(resolution = 2) %>%
    RunUMAP(dims = 1:30)

DimPlot(SO, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE)

DimPlot(SO, reduction = "umap", group.by = "group")

DimPlot(SO, reduction = "umap", group.by = "class_merge")

DimPlot(SO, reduction = "umap", split.by = "group")

t1 <- table(SO@meta.data$class_merge, SO$group)[, c("WT", "4M_Alp", "4M_Alp_1EV", "4M_Alp_2EV", "6M_Alp")]
t1
##       
##          WT 4M_Alp 4M_Alp_1EV 4M_Alp_2EV 6M_Alp
##   EC   6591   2132        896       5302   2781
##   IMM  1852    750        247       1328    641
##   MES  1390    233        108        986    501
##   PEC    50     62          0         53    128
##   PODO  240    308        190        542    325
##   VSMC   79      0          0          0     79
prop.t1 <- prop.table(t1, margin = 2) 
prop.t1
##       
##                 WT      4M_Alp  4M_Alp_1EV  4M_Alp_2EV      6M_Alp
##   EC   0.646049794 0.611764706 0.621790423 0.645719157 0.624242424
##   IMM  0.181533033 0.215208034 0.171408744 0.161734259 0.143883277
##   MES  0.136247795 0.066857963 0.074947953 0.120082816 0.112457912
##   PEC  0.004901000 0.017790531 0.000000000 0.006454756 0.028731762
##   PODO 0.023524799 0.088378766 0.131852880 0.066009012 0.072951740
##   VSMC 0.007743580 0.000000000 0.000000000 0.000000000 0.017732884
t2 <- as.data.frame(t1)
colnames(t2) <- c('Cell_type', 'Group', 'Frequency')

# Original plot

ggplot(t2, aes(fill=Cell_type, y=Frequency, x=Group)) + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat = "identity", fun.y = "mean", colour="black") +
  theme_classic()

t1 <- table(SO@meta.data$class_merge, SO$sample)[, c("452", "453", "454", "365", "372", "474", "362", "368", "475", "364", "375", "473", "A", "B", "C")]
t1
##       
##         452  453  454  365  372  474  362  368  475  364  375  473    A    B
##   EC   2388 1741 2462 1522  181  429  363  490   43 2289  321 2692 1605  184
##   IMM   693  563  596  475   73  202  129  102   16  435   39  854  464   50
##   MES   558  500  332  167   18   48   54   47    7  456   56  474  354   43
##   PEC    20   11   19   53    0    9    0    0    0   28    5   20   68    4
##   PODO   88   64   88  235   14   59   78  104    8  123   69  350  168   21
##   VSMC   25   29   25    0    0    0    0    0    0    0    0    0   75    2
##       
##           C
##   EC    992
##   IMM   127
##   MES   104
##   PEC    56
##   PODO  136
##   VSMC    2
prop.t1 <- prop.table(t1, margin = 2) 
prop.t1
##       
##                452         453         454         365         372         474
##   EC   0.633085896 0.598693260 0.699034639 0.620717781 0.632867133 0.574297189
##   IMM  0.183722163 0.193603851 0.169222033 0.193719413 0.255244755 0.270414993
##   MES  0.147932131 0.171939477 0.094264622 0.068107667 0.062937063 0.064257028
##   PEC  0.005302227 0.003782669 0.005394662 0.021615008 0.000000000 0.012048193
##   PODO 0.023329799 0.022008253 0.024985804 0.095840131 0.048951049 0.078982597
##   VSMC 0.006627784 0.009972490 0.007098240 0.000000000 0.000000000 0.000000000
##       
##                362         368         475         364         375         473
##   EC   0.581730769 0.659488560 0.581081081 0.687181027 0.655102041 0.613211845
##   IMM  0.206730769 0.137281292 0.216216216 0.130591414 0.079591837 0.194533030
##   MES  0.086538462 0.063257066 0.094594595 0.136895827 0.114285714 0.107972665
##   PEC  0.000000000 0.000000000 0.000000000 0.008405884 0.010204082 0.004555809
##   PODO 0.125000000 0.139973082 0.108108108 0.036925848 0.140816327 0.079726651
##   VSMC 0.000000000 0.000000000 0.000000000 0.000000000 0.000000000 0.000000000
##       
##                  A           B           C
##   EC   0.587051939 0.605263158 0.700070572
##   IMM  0.169714704 0.164473684 0.089625970
##   MES  0.129480614 0.141447368 0.073394495

##   PODO 0.061448427 0.069078947 0.095977417

t2 <- as.data.frame(t1)
colnames(t2) <- c('Cell_type', 'Group', 'Frequency')

# Original plot

ggplot(t2, aes(fill=Cell_type, y=Frequency, x=Group)) + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat = "identity", fun.y = "mean", colour="black") +
  theme_classic()

5.4 Filtering Non-Glom clusters

markers.to.plot1 <- c("Lrp2",         # PT
                      "Slc5a12",      # PT-S1
                      "Slc13a3",      # PT-S2
                      "Slc16a9",      # PT-S3
                      "Havcr1",       # Injured PT
                      "Epha7",        # dTL
                      "Cryab",        # dTL
                      "Cdh13",        # dTL1
                      "Slc14a2",      # dTL2
                      "Slc12a1",      # TAL
                      "Umod",         # TAL, DCT1
                      "Egf",          # TAL, DCT1,
                      "Cldn10",       # TAL
                      "Cldn16",       # TAL
                      "Nos1",         # MD
                      "Slc12a3",      # DCT
                      "Pvalb",        # DCT1
                      "Slc8a1",       # DCT2, CNT
                      "Aqp2",         # PC
                      "Slc4a1",       # IC-A
                      "Slc26a4",      # IC-B
                      "Nphs2",        # Podo
                      "Ncam1",        # PEC
                      "Flt1",         # Endo
                      "Emcn",         # Glom Endo
                      "Kdr",          # Capillary Endo
                      "Pdgfrb",       # Perivascular
                      "Pdgfra",       # Fib
                      "Piezo2",       # Mesangial
                      "Acta2",        # Mural
                      "Ptprc",        # Immune
                      "Cd74",         # Macrophage
                      "Skap1",        # B/T Cells 
                      "Upk1b",        # Uro
                      "Top2a"         # Proliferation
)
                      
DotPlot(SO,
features = markers.to.plot1,
dot.scale = 8,
dot.min = 0,
scale.max = 100,
scale.min = 0,
col.min = -2.5,
col.max = 2.5)+
coord_flip()

DimPlot(SO, group.by = "class_merge")

FeaturePlot(SO, "Ehd3")

FeaturePlot(SO, "Tspan7")

FeaturePlot(SO, "Pi16")

FeaturePlot(SO, "Plvap")

FeaturePlot(SO, "Igfbp3", order = T)

FeaturePlot(SO, "Npr3", order = T)

FeaturePlot(SO, "Cryab", order = T)

FeaturePlot(SO, "Aqp1", order = T)

Idents(SO) <- SO$class_merge

markers.EC <- FindMarkers(SO, ident.1 = "4M_Alp", ident.2 = "WT" , group.by = "group", subset.ident = "EC", logfc.threshold = 0.25, min.pct = 0.1)

VlnPlot(SO, "Fabp4", group.by = "group", idents = "EC")

VlnPlot(SO, "Fkbp5", group.by = "group", idents = "EC")

VlnPlot(SO, "Zbtb16", group.by = "group", idents = "EC")

VlnPlot(SO, "Gda", group.by = "group", idents = "EC")

VlnPlot(SO, "Ly6a", group.by = "group", idents = "EC")

VlnPlot(SO, "Lpl", group.by = "group", idents = "EC")

VlnPlot(SO, "Insr", group.by = "group", idents = "EC")

VlnPlot(SO, "Itgb3", group.by = "group", idents = "EC")

VlnPlot(SO, "Fosb", group.by = "group", idents = "EC", split.by = "sample")

6 Save Object

saveRDS(SO, here("outputs", "Alports_041525.rds"))
